'''ngogadhaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:lyery|lyery]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-g-dh
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:lyery|lyery]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngogadhaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogadhithi|ngogadhithi]] || [[word:ngogadhiji|ngogadhiji]] || [[word:ngogadhishi|ngogadhishi]] || [[word:ngogadhiki|ngogadhiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogadhuthuthu|ngogadhuthuthu]] || [[word:ngogadhujuju|ngogadhujuju]] || [[word:ngogadhushushu|ngogadhushushu]] || [[word:ngogadhukuku|ngogadhukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogadhuthu|ngogadhuthu]] || [[word:ngogadhuju|ngogadhuju]] || [[word:ngogadhushu|ngogadhushu]] || [[word:ngogadhuku|ngogadhuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogadhufthuf|ngogadhufthuf]] || [[word:ngogadhufjuf|ngogadhufjuf]] || [[word:ngogadhufshuf|ngogadhufshuf]] || [[word:ngogadhufkuf|ngogadhufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogadhethe|ngogadhethe]] || [[word:ngogadheje|ngogadheje]] || [[word:ngogadheshe|ngogadheshe]] || [[word:ngogadheke|ngogadheke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogadhothotho|ngogadhothotho]] || [[word:ngogadhojojo|ngogadhojojo]] || [[word:ngogadhoshosho|ngogadhoshosho]] || [[word:ngogadhokoko|ngogadhokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogadhotho|ngogadhotho]] || [[word:ngogadhojo|ngogadhojo]] || [[word:ngogadhosho|ngogadhosho]] || [[word:ngogadhoko|ngogadhoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogadhofthof|ngogadhofthof]] || [[word:ngogadhofjof|ngogadhofjof]] || [[word:ngogadhofshof|ngogadhofshof]] || [[word:ngogadhofkof|ngogadhofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻf|ngogadhĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŠthĂŠ|ngogadhĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŠjĂŠ|ngogadhĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŠshĂŠ|ngogadhĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngogadhĂŠkĂŠ|ngogadhĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngogadhathatha|ngogadhathatha]] || [[word:ngogadhajaja|ngogadhajaja]] || [[word:ngogadhashasha|ngogadhashasha]] || [[word:ngogadhakaka|ngogadhakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngogadhatha|ngogadhatha]] || [[word:ngogadhaja|ngogadhaja]] || [[word:ngogadhasha|ngogadhasha]] || [[word:ngogadhaka|ngogadhaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngogadhafthaf|ngogadhafthaf]] || [[word:ngogadhafjaf|ngogadhafjaf]] || [[word:ngogadhafshaf|ngogadhafshaf]] || [[word:ngogadhafkaf|ngogadhafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngogadhasha|ngogadhasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogadhshĂ«asha|ngogadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogadhroasha|ngogadhroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogadhmuasha|ngogadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogadhyaasha|ngogadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogadhnkshĂ«asha|gongogadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogadhnkroasha|gongogadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogadhnkmuasha|gongogadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogadhnkyaasha|gongogadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngogagadhasha|ngogagadhasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogagadhshĂ«asha|ngogagadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogagadhroasha|ngogagadhroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogagadhmuasha|ngogagadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogagadhyaasha|ngogagadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogagadhnkshĂ«asha|gongogagadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogagadhnkroasha|gongogagadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogagadhnkmuasha|gongogagadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogagadhnkyaasha|gongogagadhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngegĂŠdhasha|ngegĂŠdhasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngegĂŠdhshĂ«asha|ngegĂŠdhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngegĂŠdhroasha|ngegĂŠdhroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngegĂŠdhmuasha|ngegĂŠdhmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngegĂŠdhyaasha|ngegĂŠdhyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongegĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha|gongegĂŠdhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongegĂŠdhnkroasha|gongegĂŠdhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongegĂŠdhnkmuasha|gongegĂŠdhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongegĂŠdhnkyaasha|gongegĂŠdhnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngogfadhasha|ngogfadhasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngogfadhshĂ«asha|ngogfadhshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngogfadhroasha|ngogfadhroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngogfadhmuasha|ngogfadhmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngogfadhyaasha|ngogfadhyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongogfadhnkshĂ«asha|gongogfadhnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongogfadhnkroasha|gongogfadhnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongogfadhnkmuasha|gongogfadhnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongogfadhnkyaasha|gongogfadhnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|8d63c8d}}
